theScene: Perpetua does a small hop of joy that ends with her making a jiggly splatting landing back on the ground, before hurryingly scooting about to finalize her preparations, stashing her book back on the shelf and grabbing a few items from about the room which she then foists upon you to carry, having no pockets or bag or any sort of inventory herself.
This is going to be so fun!♪

In a whirlwind of motion, the two of you have everything packed up in record time... probably too much packed up, actually. But regardless, you soon make your way out of the village to the nearby checkpoint gem, getting a number of goodbye waves from blue slimes as you go, as well as a few not-so-discreet comments about you and 'Petua' that make her huff and pout annoyedly as she drags you onwards.
Take care, Petua! We love you!
Casting you a suspicious glance to check that you're not laughing, she then hurries up and touches the gem...
music/Mountain/Purple Planet Music - Chilled - Desert Winds (3_12).mp3

... immediately transporting you to the foot of the Mountains, the two of you needing a moment to adjust to the dizzying shift of terrain before Perpetua takes a deep breath and starts energetically scooting around with a nostalgic smile.
So many memories here, huh? Like that time we met the one and only Black Knight! You didn't stand a chance back then, but who knows, maybe now, you could actually make her break a sweat!

Letting her giddily ramble on, you leisurely make your way forward, enjoying the restful walk and peaceful sights, until your slimy companion suddenly gives you an unexpected gooey nudge, her face lighting up with even greater excitement.

Eagerly, she points over to a flat white stone platform surrounded with exotic-looking wooden arches painted red, complete with a short wooden safety railing. You also notice blue inlaid gems underneath the stonework, the clearly magical jewels keeping the stone gently aloft a few inches above the ground.
Hey, look! Speaking of the Black Knight, the lift got fixed!
She hops cheerfully in place a moment, then scoots over to take your hand and drag you onwards with a proud smile, the red slime chattering on while waving her free arm animatedly.
You didn't get to try it before, right? So we should ride it up to our destination! The view is great!♪

I should know, I rode it up prior to your arrival so I could ride it down dramatically for our rematch! Lots of preplanning went into that ambush! I even did several trips back and forth just to figure out the perfect timing to head down when I would see you coming...
...Though in the end, the Black Knight blowing up both me and the lift kinda made all that prep work kinda pointless...
But it was still a blast in its own way, haha!
{b}And{/b} I got to see the Dark Champion of Monsterkind in the flesh! Isn't that cool!?

She rambles on for a bit as you both get onto the lift, at which point the cherry slime's smile falters for a bit while she messes with the controls of the magic lift, muttering to herself. Meanwhile, you can't help but nervously look around, a small part of you wondering if the lift is going to get blown up again by another angry interloper...
Well it was a blast {i}aside{/i} from getting stuck in dark dank caverns full of licky monsters with a thirst for cherry...
... But this time, it should all be smooth sailing! Just gotta turn this dial, press this button, and...

There's a click, a clang, and slowly, the lift hums to life. With a slight lurch that forces you to hold onto the railing while Perpetua stumbles backwards into you with a panicked squeak, the two of you slowly ascend towards the Mountain heights, the jiggly woman giving you an awkward smile at her blunder.
Well, all in all, it all makes for some really nice memories, right?
I wish they'd been less... rocky.
Any memory with you is a good one.

She gives you a warm yet casual smile before sliding away from you and grabbing the railing to enjoy the rising view overlooking the Mystic Forest and beyond, the sweeping vista stretching far off into the horizon as you keep going up, the sight of the sea giving you an unexpected feeling of nostalgia as you remember your arrival on Lucidia...
Oh, don't be a grouch... I bet you're just mad that you got your butt kicked by the Black Knight.

She blows you a pouty raspberry before sliding away from you and grabbing the railing to enjoy the rising view overlooking the Mystic Forest and beyond, the sweeping vista stretching far off into the horizon as you keep going up, the sight of the sea giving you an unexpected feeling of nostalgia as you remember your arrival on Lucidia...

EventText.NameOfScene: I wish they'd been less... rocky.
theScene: Did you expect the Mountain to not have rocks?

She says with a cheeky smirk, which turns into a cocky giggle when you glare at her, then she slides away from you and grabs the railing to enjoy the rising view overlooking the Mystic Forest and beyond, the sweeping vista stretching far off into the horizon as you keep going up, the sight of the sea giving you an unexpected feeling of nostalgia as you remember your arrival on Lucidia...

EventText.NameOfScene: Any memory with you is a good one.
theScene: Perpetua lets out a sputtering noise of flustered incoherence at your comeback, then looks about bashfully while the lift keeps steadily rising into the air.

Nevertheless, she cannot help but relax and smile contently, leaning into your side ever so slightly as she watches the rising view overlooking the Mystic Forest and beyond, the sweeping vista stretching far off into the horizon as you keep going up, the sight of the sea giving you an unexpected feeling of nostalgia as you remember your arrival on Lucidia...

You continue your ride in relaxed silence as you're both slowly carried higher and higher into the Mountain heights, the oddly breathtaking sight giving you both pause, proving strangely more eye-catching than when seen from the very top of the Mountain itself...
Perpetua glances at you for a thoughtful moment, and opens her mouth to say something... before the lift suddenly lurches to a abrupt stop, leaving her wobbling and stuttering.
Ah, crud- That's our stop! Come on, let's move!

She hurriedly scoots her way over and opens a side gate onto a rocky pathway, waving for you to follow her. As you do, you take another look at the Lucidian panorama, grabbing that one last opportunity to drink it in before taking off after Perpetua, the uneven road ahead forcing you to pay more attention to your footing than to the view.

Even the previously garrulous slime girl can't find much opportunity to chat as she oozes carefully over the stones and rocky crevices of the bumpy terrain, the two of you carrying on forward in nigh-wordless focus...

...Until eventually, you come into view of a gooey, bubbly pool of mostly transparent green liquid that gently fizzes as bubbles drift off its surface and rise in the air before popping a few moments later, Perpetua immediately letting out a 'Ah-ha!' of triumph at the sight and fearlessly scooting forward with determination in her eyes.

Without hesitation, she leans over the rocky edge and dramatically raises her arms, then rapidly pokes at the pliant liquid with both of her indexes in constant succession, her face set into a dry glare.
Hey! Wake up, lazy jelly! I'm back with an offer you won't refuse, this time!

There's a burbly grumble from the pool, and the completely green top of a mature woman's head with luscious gooey hair peeks out for a brief moment to glare at Perpetua, before sinking back in with a huff, the large slime shifting as though someone was rolling over in bed, leaving Perpetua sputtering in indignation.
{i}Awuhg-{/i} Ah, come on, I'm serious! At least hear us out!
The cherry slime fulminates while insistently shaking the goo at the edge of the pool, this time with a firm grip of her hands...

...until her frantic motions make her lose her balance and topple forward, the small jelly girl struggling to find purchase on the slick rocky ground, but failing due to her paltry goo pool, her panicked movements only making her fall faster straight into the big fizzy pond, spurring you to hurry up and help her.

However, it appears your assistance won't be required, as with a jiggly ripple, the red slime bounces over the surface of the much larger green one, the tension of their liquid bodies resisting each other with a wobbly impact, leaving Perpetua hopping onward like a skipping stone.
She is unfortunately cut off when, eventually, after one rebound too many, she sinks into the softer bubble slime goop with a wet sound, as though she landed into some sort of quicksand.
Ahhhhh!? [ThePlayerName], help! I'm stuck- sinking!!! Tell Sleim Vllge I love th- Awuh-?

Before you can act or Perpetua can finish her last will, a form suddenly rises from the green goo with a lazy miffed sigh straight under Perpetua, the humanoid shape quickly solidifying into that of a curvaceous goo woman who holds the cherry slime in her arms, her smaller brethren's head resting in her cleavage as she looks down poutily at the raucous intruder.
Hmph... Alright, honey, I'll hear your ranting song and dance again... Just stop being so noisy, so flailing, and so... shaky...

Perpetua perks up in happy relief as she rests in the hold of the matronly goo woman, though the unnamed green slime's attention is quickly drawn to you as she realizes that Perpetua isn't alone, one of her brows rising curiously as she looks you up and down.
Oh! That's [ThePlayerName]! [ThePlayerName], meet Ambrosia, soon-to-be resident of Sleim Vllge.♪
Hmm... Hey there, honey.♥ Once little red is done with her spiel, how about we-♥
Perpetua flails in mild huffy discontent, cutting off the flirtatious woman.
Upupup- None of that right now! If you wanna bang [ThePlayerName], you can do it once we get you a home in Sleim Vllge... and also when you're not in the middle of holding me.
Wait, does he visit often or something...?

She asks curiously while lazily lifting Perpetua out of the gooey pool to set her safely back on the rocky pathway, Ambrosia's gaze flitting between you both curiously... Though judging by the way she licks her lips whenever her eyes rest on you, it's rather clear who interests her the most.
Maybe-? Kinda-? He doesn't live there- He's just here to help unstick you and provide support.
The bigger slime lets out an airy sigh that makes her curvaceous body jiggle alluringly, nestling her head into one hand and looking away tiredly as she mutters.
As I told you before, I'm quite cozy here, so I'm not exactly 'stuck'... More like... mmh... like...

Ambrosia trails off, nonchalantly looking at the clouds and mumbling absentmindedly, but Perpetua doesn't let her drift away for long,  smugly smirking and letting out a small laugh as she brings Operation Fizzy Pop back on track.
Well... that's why we're here! To change your mind!~

That recaptures the attention of the languid goo girl who glances at her, and with a flourish, the cherry-colored slime profers a fruit from one of the bags she got you to carry, showing off a red apple- No... A red pear with a greenish edge?

With a burst of movement and energy quite unexpected from her, the lazy woman oozes forward, snatches the fruit out of Perpetua's hand, and swiftly bites into it... or at least, as close to biting as a slime can get, munching on the sweet treat with a happy expression. Meanwhile, the dispossessed Perpetua sputters indignantly, stomping a gooey foot.
Wh- {i}Hey!{/i} You could let me finish my speech before you get grabby!

But the green slime doesn't pay Perpetua's complaints any mind, her plush lips forming a thoughtful frown as she looks to the red slime with suspicion, hoisting the fruit and pointing an accusatory finger at it.
Oh! Maybe that's because I got it from a Glubber?
...The fish that stores fruit it finds on shores in its cheek pouches?
Apparently not amused, Ambrosia draws her arm back, quite clearly getting ready for a retaliatory Appel throw.

Perpetua squeaks in panic as the oblong projectile zooms towards her with impressive accuracy, but right before it hits her head, the half-eaten fruit meets your invisible shield, bouncing off into the air then half-thudding, half-splatting onto the rocky ground, leaving your slime companion sighing out in relief.
The diminutive slime then swiftly redirects her gaze to her bigger brethren, fuming.

Leaping into action with speed and agility, you jump next to Perpetua and hold out your arm, unflinchingly catching the Appel and even leaving it completely undamaged in your skillful grasp! You take a moment to bask in the success of your quick intervention and in Ambrosia's nonplussed expression, until your attention is drawn to the wet sounds of Perpetua's clapping.
The diminutive slime then swiftly redirects her gaze to her bigger brethren, fuming.
While Perpetua blinks in surprise, belatedly realizing what is coming, words quickly come to you!
Hey, let's talk this out, alright? ... And maybe we can do more than talk, if you know what I mean...
Ambrosia's angry expression quickly gives way to a flirtatious one as she forgets all about the nasty Appel and tosses it away absentmindedly, the slime woman winking lasciviously.
The diminutive slime then swiftly redirects her gaze to her bigger brethren, fuming.

As if in slow motion, you watch the improvised missile shoot towards Perpetua's face and hit her square on the forehead, the Appel bouncing off of her with a jiggle then careening off the side of the cliff, the red slime crying out with fortunately nothing more than her pride hurt.
I could still taste the fish! Did you even {i}wash{/i} that thing???
Guh- Wha- Yes! Yes, I {i}did{/i} wash it!

Nonono! Moving on-! Once again, I'm here to convince you to join Sleim Vllge! And that one Appel was just a {i}taste{/i} of what could be yours! There's a perfect spot for you to live and laze in all you want while surrounded by an Appel Orchard... One that {i}won't{/i} taste fishy and weird! Plus all the other amazing amenities the village offers...
...An entire orchard? ...I don't remember you mentioning that before...
But after you told me about how much you like them, I planned out a bunch of ways to get one set up! We could transplant a bunch of trees from somewhere else...
Honey- That would cost a fortun-

Not letting the bigger slime interject, Perpetua keeps going, excitedly listing other possible plans and counting them on her fingers, having clearly rehearsed that speech a lot... Perhaps a bit too much, actually.
...Or we could use the seeds I've collected from catching Glubbers to grow our own orchard... And maybe get some magic growth stuff or hire a witch or {i}something{/i} to make them sprout faster...

While Ambrosia sighs, lounging back and seemingly accepting her fate of listening to the small slime prattle on, Perpetua deftly takes another of the bags she got you to carry and sets it down on the pool's edge to open it with a surprising lack of theatrics for her, revealing that much like the first one, it is filled to the brim with Appels... whose slightly fishy scent you can actually smell now that it's so concentrated.
{b}And{/b} to sweeten the deal, I'll give you all of these to start!

Blinking, Ambrosia glides forward and grabs one of the Appels, sniffing it with an expression of distaste, then casting an incredulous look at how many the sack is filled with and how many more you seem to be carrying, looking at the jubilant Perpetua like she doesn't know whether she should be impressed or scared.
...Honey, you got {i}all{/i} of these from Glubbers?
My... That does actually amount to quite a hefty sum...

Mmmh, not {i}that{/i} much? But there is definitely a market for them: people with uncommon or exotic tastes. Or agriculturists trying to come up with new cultivars. Or alchemists or potion-makers or wizards using them as reagents... It will take some networking, but they're definitely not dead weight.♪

You can feel the gears in Ambrosia's mind turning while the jubilant Perpetua turns to you and gives you a not-so-inconspicuous thumbs-up for your opportune question, clearly having to make an effort to keep herself from exulting when the green slime nods contently.
I think I can work with this... Not eating a single one, of course, but... Actually, how did you get so many?
Uhm- I found a fishing spot on the coast-? And kept going back until I got enough-?
Sweetheart, this... must have taken a week straight of catching Glubbers? And tossing back the ones with the wrong fruit...?
music/Mountain/Purple Planet Music - Chilled - Desert Winds (3_12).mp3

There's an awkward lull as Ambrosia eyes Perpetua critically while the cherry slime looks down, poking her fingers together... Until the green goo girl lets out a deep sigh, which turns into a melodious and still slightly incredulous laugh.
My my my... If nothing else, you're certainly determined, aren't you?
W-Well yeah! It's important, and stuff... There's a lot to be done with Sleim Vllge, but it's a very nice place, and it could be an even nicer one with some work and new faces around...

She trails off when Ambrosia extends a hand and musses her gooey hair, the normally pat-adverse slime so surprised by the gesture that she just looks back perplexedly while her larger brethren chuckles.
I'll move in, Perpetua, stop being so mopey. I can handle the orchard... And if the land is as good as you say, those Appels should be a treat fit for a queen.♪
Yes! Though... there is {i}one{/i} issue... I {i}am{/i} actually stuck in this cozy hole of a home...
Ah-ha! {i}I knew it!{/i} But don't worry! I came prepared for that-!
She digs into another one of the bags she got you to carry, pulls out a large fishing net, and hands it to you authoritatively.

Alright, [ThePlayerName], you're up! There's no way I can pull her out of there, but you're an accomplished adventurer who's very strong and very skilled! Just think of her as a fish you need to yank out of the sea and you'll do great!
...There's a {i}lot{/i} about what you just said that I don't appreciate.
But I admit I'm curious to see if this [ThePlayerName] of yours is as much of a strapping capable hunk as you're making him out to be. Alright, get to it, Perpetua's boyfriend!

While Perpetua fixes Ambrosia with an angry glare that completely fails to intimidate her, you let out a resigned sigh and take hold of the net, preparing to 'catch' Ambrosia and pull her free of the pit she lives in. You can't help but reflect that when you came to Lucidia to defeat the Demon Queen, this is really not the kind of heroics you had in mind for a bona fide adventurer...
Try as you might, you can't manage to get a good hold on Ambrosia's sticky form with the net, leaving her wobbling poutily in place, the jiggling of her erotic curvy body not helping with your focus.
Honey, you can do better than that, right? You better not be thinking I'm fat or something... Or are you just clumsy? That's not a good look for a guy...
Wha- Come on, [ThePlayerName], you can do it! We didn't come this far just to fail now! Try again!
Wiping some sweat off your brow, you prepare to cast the net again.
There's a loud {i}schlorp{/i} as the entangling net closes upon Ambrosia and you pull her free with a grunt of effort, both slimes cheering for your 'fishing' efforts in unison.
Mhm, you actually pulled through... He's quite good with his hands, isn't he?♥

The lascivious green slime coos out while untangling herself from the surprisingly clingy fishing net before giving you a quick fizzy peck and briefly pressing her jellowy curves against you, the possible innuendo going over Perpetua's head as she enjoys the triumphant moment and stores the net away.
So... Which way to this village of yours, exactly?
Perpetua cheerfully scoots over to the edge of the trail and points off into the distance.
Wayyyyy over there- The big lake well past the giant elf tree!
... That sounds... a little {i}too{/i} far, doesn't it? There is frankly {i}no way{/i} I'm making the entire trip, even for a whole Appel Orchard...
Don't worry, we can use the checkpoint at the base of the Mountain to get there with no hassle!
Well, honey, that {i}is{/i} better... But- that's still very far away, isn't it? Going all the way to the elevator...
The languid slime says while surely but slowly sliding along the earthen path towards the lift......... Very... very... slowly...
Wh- Is that seriously your top speed?!
Not really, but it's {i}really{/i} tiring to move any faster than thi-
Before you're treated to more of Ambrosia and Perpetua's bickering, there's a distant bouncy sound rapidly approaching, and looking back-
You are treated to the sight of a swarm of blue slimes who crowd around you all, surrounding you with praise and cheers and opportunistically giving the sputtering Perpetua a few hugs!
Great job, [ThePlayerName]! We'll get her back home!

The blue slimes gather around Ambrosia as one man, or rather as one jelly lady, and readily hoist her up in a wobbly lift before happily scooting back with her, making the large bubbly woman titter in amusement.
Oh! I could get used to this.♪

Perpetua is left sputtering indignantly for a few moments at the unexpected but helpful irruption before huffily following after them with you in tow, your slimy cortege leading you all back to the Mountain lift which you ride together, being once more treated on the way down to the panoramic view, though with... a lot more company, the elevator abuzz with squeals, comments, and smells of blueberry and apple with a hint of cherry.
Just as pretty as when we went up...
I suppose I will miss the view...
Oh, it's okay! We can take you to visit whenever you wanna.

Perpetua, meanwhile, lets out a mildly tired sigh while looking off into the distance, a surprisingly serene silence eventually settling over the gaggle of slimes whose excited chatter dies down as they restfully enjoy the view... Until you reach the end of your ride and all make your way to the gem-
Which brings you back to Sleim Vllge in an instant.

Then with a flurry of movement and many greetings as Ambrosia is effectively paraded through town and Perpetua is given more unwanted affection and hugs of victory, the new resident gets taken to her new home off to the side of the village, her slime carriers plopping her down into a large hole surrounded by a fresh clearing. The location offers a picturesque view of the lake, and would indeed be the perfect spot for an orchard.
Without further fanfare, the blue slimes scatter cheerfully and bouncily to go back to doing whatever they please, a few of them waving the three of you goodbye.
Welcome again to Sleim Vllge, Booble Slime!

The thus far entertained slime woman gives an indignant huff at the nickname while Perpetua visibly does her best to keep herself from bursting into giggles, turning away with a choked laugh while Ambrosia opts to ignore the slight, move on, and get herself cozy, using her fizzy goop to fill and reshape the dirt hole with surprising readiness, already making herself comfortable while peeking around at her new domain.
{i}Ahem...{/i} Well... Here you are... Sorry there's no orchard yet...

Oh! Like I said, honey, don't worry about that, I've got it. I've been working on something while all those blue slimes were hauling me around... To be honest, I've actually been preparing for something like this for a while, so with some magic stones I've been collecting...
You and Perpetua watch quizzically as the green slime hums cheerfully and upturns one of the bags of Appels she had been given...

...but instead of Appels, she reveals what looks to be a myriad of small jelly green blobs that visibly sparkle with a hint of magic. You're not given any time to inspect them, however, as Ambrosia immediately tosses them into the air in a wide arc and with surprising strength for someone so lazy, scattering them about the clearing.

As the jelly blobs make contact with the soil, they glow brightly before sinking into the earth and erupting several seconds later into large, rapidly-growing Appel trees that sprout and unfurl into a large cozy orchard around Ambrosia, some even quickly growing fruit!
Holy cherries!!! What the heck was that?!?!
Well... I'm not your run-of-the-mill slime. I'm a magic jelly maker. And with a few things I already had and all those Appels you gave me, I was able to whip up an instant orchard. Tada~♪

Right after that uncustomary display of energy, Ambrosia immediately goes back to her usual self, sinking into her new dwelling with a languid sigh, her curvy form half disappearing into a pool of her own slime.
...Don't go expecting me to be able to do that again, though. It took me forever to get all the stuff for it... And it's {i}tiring{/i} too.
I-I won't-! B-But that was... {i}amazing!{/i} Man, Silver's gonna have a great time getting to know you, I bet!
Oh, I'm sure I'll have plenty of time to get settled and get to know everyone here...
But first, I want to take a nap... Or two...
We-Well, we should let you get comfortable, then... So... um- Welcome to Sleim Vllge! And thank you very much for giving us a chance!!!
Perpetua sputters indignantly and quickly sets to dragging you off back to the center of town, blushing furiously at the nickname.
Grghvmg... W-Well, we should get going! I swear, those slimebrains can't ever watch what they're saying...
As you're being hauled off, you wave Ambrosia goodbye, the matronly slime cracking open one eye to give you a seductive wink as she runs a smooth hand over her alluring curves.
Mhm... And thank you too, [ThePlayerName].~ Be sure to visit.♥

With her enticing words hanging in the air, you and Perpetua leave the new sudden addition to Sleim Vllge, making sure to swing by the Sleim Shoppe in order to keep Silver apprised of these new developments, then returning to the town center where the red slime lets out a tired huff.
Phew... Well... That went really well... Better than I expected, actually... But I am... {i}so{/i} adventured out now...

Thanks a bunch for your help, [ThePlayerName]. I'm gonna head home and... probably take a nap too... But then I'll get to work planning my- {i}our{/i} next evil scheme! Until then, be sure to take a break and check in with Silver's store to see what new stuff she has.

And with that, Perpetua rapidly scoots away before she's swarmed by the gaggle of cheerful blue slimes that had been slowly converging closer to the two of you, giggling self-congratulatorily as she returns home, leaving you alone and now free to decide what to do next after a job well done...
